function.name: _i18n_save_locale_designer
function.description: Save the list of languages supported by the application. Used for internationalization translation and interface language switching configuration

localeList.description: List of language codes supported by the application

items.description: Language code. Only one of the following values can be filled: zh_CN (Simplified Chinese), zh_TW (Traditional Chinese), en_US (English), ja (Japanese).
